title: oplismenus hirtellus subsp. setarius
intro: Oplismenus hirtellus subsp. setarius, commonly known as the hairy wood grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Oplismenus hirtellus subsp. setarius include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Traditionally, this plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and made into capsules or tablets for easier consumption.
